questionHtml: The spacecraft will take 7.2 years (2.3 × 108 s) to reach a planet in the solar system. Estimate the power available to the spacecraft when it gets to the planet.
markschemeHtml:
available power after time t is P0e−λt ✓

18e−2.50×10−10×2.3×108=17.0 «kW» ✓

 

MP1 may be implicit.

Allow ECF from (c)(i).

Allow 17.4 kW from unrounded power from (c)(i).

Allow 18.8 kW from 6 MeV.

meta.title: The spacecraft will take 7.2 years (2.3 × 108 s) to reach a planet in the solar system. Estimate the power available to the spacecraft when it gets to the planet.
